What We Covered In This Module:
✓ Purpose Of The Transaction Maximum Sequence!
✓ Maximization Offer #1: The Reverse Add-On!
✓ Maximization Offer #2: The Soft Add-On!
✓ Maximization Offer #3: The Mid-Tier Add-On!
✓ Key Elements Of Transaction Maximization Pages!
✓ The Thank You Page “Gift” Offer Add-On
Module 6

-- 1 of 3 --

What To Do Now:
1. 	Decide What Your Reverse Add-On Offer Is Going To Be!
2. 	Decide What Your Soft Add-On Offer Is Going To Be!
3. 	Decide What Your Mid-Tier Add-On Offer Is Going To Be!
4. 	Decide What Your Thank You Page “Gift Offer” Is Going To Be!
5. 	(If you’re using SAMCart) Set-up Each Of The Transaction
Maximization Offers and Pages Inside Of SAMCart!
6. 	(If you’re not using SAMCart) Set-up Each Of The Transaction
Maximization Pages On Your Own Domain
Module 6

-- 2 of 3 --

Important Note:
You Do 	NOT 	Have To Start With All
Three Transaction Maximization Offers. 	!
!
You Can Add Them As You Create Them.
Module 6

-- 3 of 3 --
